name: Flour Measuring Hint
recipeInstructions:
1. All flour is presifted but it settles during shipment. A cup of flour scooped directly from the bag can weigh up to 5 ounces. It should weigh 4 ounces. To measure correctly, fluff up the flour in the bag or canister.
2. Then sprinkle it lightly into a measuring cup, scraping the excess off the top with a knife.
